info.longBusinessSummary: Nexien BioPharma, Inc. focuses on the formulation, development, and commercialization of cannabinoid-based pharmaceuticals, drug delivery systems, and related technologies for diseases, disorders, and medical conditions in the United States. The company was formerly known as Intiva BioPharma Inc. and changed its name to Nexien BioPharma, Inc. in September 2018. Nexien BioPharma, Inc. is based in Glendale, Colorado.

companyOfficers.name: Mr. Robert I. Goldfarb Esq., J.D.
companyOfficers.title: Chief Operating Officer
